title: Task
description: A DataSync task defining source location, destination location, and transfer configuration.

TaskArn.description: The ARN of the DataSync task. This ARN uniquely identifies the task.

SourceLocationArn.description: The ARN of the source location. This ARN uniquely identifies the location.

DestinationLocationArn.description: The ARN of the destination location. This ARN uniquely identifies the location.
